/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/tests/test_vector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/tests/test_physics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/tests/test_optimizers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/src/Vector.cc.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/src/LennardJones.cc.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/src/Optimizers.cc.o -o unit_tests  lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgtest.a
